forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle. Mostly cloudy. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Drizzle then Mostly Sunny
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle before 11am. Mostly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 7 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
As the night lingers on in Downtown San Francisco, a subtle mist wraps the city in a gentle embrace, hinting at the slight chance of drizzle foretold by the weather report. The air comes alive with a coolness, settling at a modest 56 degrees under a blanket of clouds, muffling the usual vigor of city lights. Should one venture out now, a light jacket or a cozy sweater would offer the warmth necessary against the whisper of the southwest wind, gliding through the streets at nearly 9 miles per hour.

Looking ahead, Thursday beckons with promises of a mild reprieve; drizzle may linger just until late morning, giving way to fleeting moments of sunshine that will gradually paint the sky. As the day unfolds, anticipate a high around 64 degrees, though a retreat to about 62 could intrigue those wandering through the afternoon. Wispy clouds will give way to long, lazy stretches of clearer skies, allowing the sunlight to filter through intermittently. With a light breeze picking up as the day progresses, one might find joy in a simple stroll along the Embarcadero or a leisurely coffee on a patio, the canvas of the day inviting casual exploration. In the spirit of this gentle San Francisco morning, a long-sleeve shirt over jeans strikes a perfect balance, allowing for spontaneity and comfort as the day warms and the city awakens.
